title: Unpublish Luminia Group Application with Branded Placeholder

requirements.summary: Replace the live application with a branded 'Coming Soon' placeholder page while preserving all existing components for future re-publishing
acceptanceCriteria: The main application content (hero, navigation, manifesto, subsidiaries, footer, welcome popup) is no longer rendered to visitors.
A placeholder page is shown in its place with the Luminia Group branding.
The placeholder page is styled consistently with the existing luxury dark design system (obsidian background, gold accents, Cormorant Garamond typography).
No broken layouts or console errors appear on the placeholder page.

file_operations.description: Create a new PlaceholderPage component that displays a centered 'Coming Soon' message with Luminia Group branding. Use the existing luxury design system tokens (obsidian background, gold accents, Cormorant Garamond typography). Include the Luminia Group logo from frontend/public/assets/generated/luminia-logo.dim_200x60.png, a heading announcing the site is temporarily unavailable, and subtle gold accent decorative elements. Apply scroll-animated entrance transitions consistent with the existing brand aesthetic.

Replace the current application layout (WelcomePopup, Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, Footer) with the new PlaceholderPage component. Comment out or conditionally hide the existing components rather than deleting them, so they can be easily restored when the site is re-published. Ensure the placeholder is the only visible content rendered to visitors.
